features.description: Staff catalogue + coach profiles. Available on every tier — every tenant needs staff.
Enables the compensation_* columns on Staff rows + the /staff/{staff}/compensation sub-resource. Opt-in per tenant — the HR settings toggle turns on the `staff_compensation_tracking` entitlement.
Enables the emergency_contact_* + tax_id_last4 fields. On by default because most tenants need this for legal + safety reasons.
Enables the reports_to_staff_id column + the direct-reports endpoint + the SDUI org-chart visualisation. Enterprise-only.

Enterprise-only compliance feature. New certifications land in pending_verification state; HR uploads a signed document + invokes the verify action; only then is the certification tagged verified. Compliance-sensitive tenants (medical rehab clinics, government-contract sports academies) enable this.
Toggles the public rating badge on the tenant's coach directory. When off, coach.rating is still computed for internal HR review but never rendered publicly. Small: off; Medium + Enterprise: on.
Enables the atomic /promote-to-manager route + the branch-manager badge in the UI. Always on.
Enables the probation_ends_at column + the reminder cadence. Always on — most jurisdictions require probation documentation.
